aeo_readiness.summary: While Romano Heating & Cooling has a solid foundation with good NAP consistency and some FAQ content, AI assistants are unlikely to cite them prominently due to insufficient authority signals and limited conversational content.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content with more detailed, conversational queries and answers.
Implement HowTo schema to demonstrate expertise in common HVAC tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate contact information, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized to address common customer questions.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema enhancements (e.g., address, geo-coordinates, opening hours).
No FAQPage schema to highlight common customer questions and answers.
No HowTo schema to demonstrate expertise in HVAC services.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best HVAC services in Roseville' or 'how to fix a furnace'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and expanding existing FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcase certifications, awards, and detailed case studies to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Be the HVAC authority AI assistants trust and recommend.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without stronger AI visibility, Romano Heating & Cooling misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with better structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates enhanced schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make Romano the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: As AI adoption grows, competitors will capture market share if Romano doesn't act now.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for Romano Heating & Cooling
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's discuss how we can enhance your AEO strategy to capture more AI-driven leads.
page_title: "Your Trusted HVAC Partner for Fall Heating | Romano Heating & Cooling services, Roseville, Rocklin, Folsom & Eldorado"
